<p>According to a handout from the Prime Minister’s Office, a high-level 11-member Chinese business delegation led by Qian Xiaoj

news.headline: Nakba Day: 78 years of ethnic cleansing
news.summary: On May 15, Palestinians across historic Palestine and the diaspora commemorate the ‘Nakba’ or the ‘catastrophe’ of 1948.
